channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nvidia has already committed $40B to equity AI deals this year
item.description: Nvidia continues to be a big investor in the AI ecosystem.

item.title: IceWhale ZimaBoard 2 mini NAS review
item.description: Following the original ZimaBoard, version 2 has an improved processor and memory, but the same passively cooled NAS credentials.

item.title: Sans ce basculement géologique il y a 3,7 milliards d’années, la vie aurait pu rester impossible sur Terre, selon une étude
item.description: Et si les continents avaient joué un rôle clé dans l’apparition de la vie sur Terre ? Selon une nouvelle étude, les premières masses continentales auraient profondément modifié la chimie des océans primitifs en régulant la concentration de bore, un élément qui pourrait avoir été essentiel à la...

item.title: These great digital gifts will arrive just in time for Mother’s Day
item.description: And just like that, Mother’s Day is tomorrow, May 10th, which is too soon for most online purchases to arrive in time. That said, you aren’t alone if you waited too long to pick up a gift this year, and you definitely aren’t alone in feeling guilty for considering digital gifts instead of something your […]

item.title: I spent two weeks with the OnePlus 15R, and it's forever raised my expectations for smartphone battery life
item.description: Even with a missing telephoto lens, the OnePlus 15R's massive new battery makes it unbeatable in its category.

item.title: Reflex ou hybride : pourquoi le viseur change tout à la qualité de vos photos
item.description: Sur un reflex comme sur un hybride, le viseur reste une question centrale, tant l'écran peut avoir des limites. Tour d'horizon des systèmes disponibles, de ce qu'ils apportent vraiment, et de ce que chacun dit de la façon dont on photographie.

item.title: Écran de smartphone incassable et inrayable : pourquoi c’est scientifiquement impossible
item.description: Les constructeurs arrangent la réalité, la résistance des smartphones ne s'améliore pas d'autant chaque année.

item.title: Ugreen DXP4800 Pro 4-bay NAS review: A subtle upgrade from the Plus model, yet these changes have significant implications for this network-attached storage device
item.description: The Ugreen DXP4800 Pro is a sophisticated four-bay NAS at a price that makes sense for both home and small business users.

item.title: More Insta360 Luna Ultra details and images have leaked — revealing a clever feature that could give it the edge over the DJI Osmo Pocket 4
item.description: It looks as though the upcoming vlogging camera from Insta360 will offer a detachable remote control unit.

item.title: Decathlon brade l’un de ses meilleurs VTT électriques avec 500 € de réduction et offre 175 euros en carte cadeau
item.description: Le Rockrider E-EXPL 700 est un vélo tout-terrain à assistance électrique qui va vous suivre dans toutes vos aventures, à retrouver pour 1 999,99 euros au lieu de 2 499,99 euros sur Decathlon.

item.title: This budget-friendly Acer Nitro V boasts an RTX 4050 and Intel Core i5 for $699.99
item.description: The Acer Nitro V is a great budget gaming laptop, and this RTX 4050 version is now even cheaper than usual at Amazon.

item.title: Let it snow
item.description: Water gets all the credit. When gaming companies want to show off new graphics technology, things tend to get wet; splashing waves that are only possible with the latest physics engine, or puddles that can reflect the world around them thanks to ray tracing. But there's something special about snow. It might not be as […]

item.title: What is the release date for Off Campus on Prime Video?
item.description: The hit Elle Kennedy books series is finally getting its small screen adaptation. But when does Off Campus drop on Prime Video?

item.title: Daredevil: Born Again season 3 — everything we know so far about the Marvel TV show's return on Disney+
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again season 3 will be released sometime in 2027 — here's everything we know ahead of its eventual release.

item.title: Mortal Kombat II review: More than just camp
item.description: It's the best Mortal Kombat film yet.

item.title: Is an AI agent is your new coworker? Make sure to lean into your humanness
item.description: Fight the FOBO (fear of becoming obsolete). Automated work still requires human judgement. Judging by a slew of recent corporate announcements, your next “co-worker” might be an artificial intelligence agent—doing the work of an assistant, job scheduler, morning debriefer, learning coach and more.
